member.name: T:Forge.Next.Security.AesCryptography
member.summary: Provides methods for AES encryption and decryption.

member.name: F:Forge.Next.Security.AesCryptography.Iterations
member.summary: The number of iterations to use in the PBKDF2 key derivation function.

member.name: F:Forge.Next.Security.AesCryptography.DefaultOutputLength
member.summary: The default output length for the derived AES key in bytes (32 bytes = 256 bits).

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Security.AesCryptography.MakeAESKey(System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Security.Cryptography.HashAlgorithmName},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates an AES key from a password and salt using PBKDF2.
member.param: The password to derive the key from.
The salt to use in the key derivation.
The hash algorithm to use in PBKDF2. Default is HashAlgorithmName.SHA256.
The desired length of the derived key.
The number of iterations to use in the key derivation.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Security.AesCryptography.AesEncrypt(System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Security.Cryptography.HashAlgorithmName},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Encrypts the given content using AES encryption with a key derived from the provided password.
member.param: The password to derive the AES key from.
The hash algorithm to use in PBKDF2. Default is HashAlgorithmName.SHA256.
The desired length of the derived key.
The number of iterations to use in the key derivation.
member.returns: The encrypted content as a base64-encoded string.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Security.AesCryptography.AesDecrypt(System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Security.Cryptography.HashAlgorithmName},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Decrypts the given encrypted content using AES decryption with a key derived from the provided password.
member.param: The password to derive the AES key from.
The hash algorithm to use in PBKDF2. Default is HashAlgorithmName.SHA256.
The desired length of the derived key.
The number of iterations to use in the key derivation.
member.returns: The decrypted content as a string.

member.name: T:Forge.Next.Security.CertificateFactory
member.summary: Provides methods for creating and managing self-signed certificates.

member.name: F:Forge.Next.Security.CertificateFactory.Localhost
member.summary: The localhost DNS name.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Security.CertificateFactory.CreateSelfSigned(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.DateTime,System.DateTime,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates the self sign certificate with MachineKeySet

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Security.CertificateFactory.CreateSelfSigned(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.DateTime,System.DateTime,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates the self sign certificate PFX.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Security.CertificateFactory.ExportToPfxRawData(System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.X509Certificate2,System.String)
member.summary: Exports to PFX raw data.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Security.CertificateFactory.ExportToCerFile(System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.X509Certificate2)
member.summary: Exports to cer file.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Security.CertificateFactory.GetForLocalhost(System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the certificate for localhost.
member.param: The subject name for the certificate. CN=your company
The friendly name for the certificate.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Security.CertificateFactory.GetFromRawData(System.Byte[],System.String)
member.summary: Gets the certificate from raw data.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Security.CertificateFactory.GetFromFile(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the certificate from file.

member.name: T:Forge.Next.Security.CertificateAccess
member.summary: Provides methods for accessing and managing certificates in the certificate store.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Security.CertificateAccess.FindByThumbprint(System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.StoreName,System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.StoreLocation,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the certificate from store by thumbprint.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Security.CertificateAccess.GetAllFromStore(System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.StoreName,System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.StoreLocation)
member.summary: Gets all certificates from store.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Security.CertificateAccess.FindByDnsNames(System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.StoreName,System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.StoreLocation,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Finds the certificates by DNS names.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Security.CertificateAccess.GetAlternateNames(System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.X509Certificate2)
member.summary: Gets the certificate alternate names.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Security.CertificateAccess.AddToStore(System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.X509Certificate2,System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.StoreName,System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.StoreLocation)
member.summary: Adds the certificate to store.

member.name: M:Forge.Next.Security.CertificateAccess.RemoveFromStore(System.String,System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.StoreName,System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.StoreLocation)
member.summary: Removes the certificate from store.
